title: pilosella subcymigera subsp. canipeduncula
intro: Pilosella subcymigera subsp. canipeduncula, a subspecies of the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Pilosella subcymigera subsp. canipeduncula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
